name: Medigen Biotechnology Corp.
summary: Medigen Biotechnology Corp. focuses on the development of therapies for liver diseases and cancers in Taiwan. It offers cell therapies, such as MAGICELL-NK, which are natural killer cells; and MAGICELL-GDT, which are T cells. The company develops PI-88 (MUPAFOSTAT), which has completed Phase II clinical trial for use as an adjuvant therapy for HCC after curative surgery; and Phase III trial for the adjuvant treatment of patients with hepatitis virus related hepatocellular carcinoma after surgical resection. It also provides OBP-301 that is in a Phase I clinical trials for the treatment of esophageal cancer, and Phase II clinical trials for the treatment of esophageal and gastric cancer. In addition, the company develops human native mAbs for therapeutic applications related to infectious diseases; and molecular diagnostics, vaccine, and generic drugs. Medigen Biotechnology Corp. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
